name: ai-assets
description: Reusable team-of-agents plugin for the full SDLC — feature design, development, bugfix, environment analysis — with built-in RALF iteration loop, layered memory, and systematic eval. Project-agnostic: operations live in plugin, project context lives in target repo (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md).

session_token_soft_cap.title: Session token soft warn
session_token_soft_cap.description: Cumulative session token count at which the plugin warns the user.

session_token_hard_cap.title: Session token hard pause
session_token_hard_cap.description: Cumulative session token count at which the plugin pauses and asks for confirmation.

ralph_default_time_cap_minutes.title: RALF default wall-time cap, minutes (per workflow)

ralph_session_max_iter.title: RALF session-aggregate max iterations
ralph_session_max_iter.description: Total RALF iterations across ALL workflows in one session (Round 6 HIGH-3). Prevents runaway when chaining /feature-design then /develop in one session.

ralph_session_token_budget.title: RALF session-aggregate token budget
ralph_session_token_budget.description: Total RALF token spend across all workflows in one session (Round 6 HIGH-3).

ralph_session_time_cap_minutes.title: RALF session-aggregate wall-time cap, minutes
ralph_session_time_cap_minutes.description: Total RALF wall-time across all workflows in one session (Round 6 HIGH-3).

subagent_learnings_enabled.title: Capture subagent outputs as learnings
subagent_learnings_enabled.description: Opt-in: enables subagent-stop-learnings hook to capture non-trivial outputs for memory-curator review.

user_global_memory_enabled.title: Allow writes to user-global memory (L5)
user_global_memory_enabled.description: Opt-in: allows /learnings-write to persist patterns to ~/.claude/ai-assets/learnings.md across all projects.

env_watch_enabled.title: Enable Docker compose health monitor
env_watch_enabled.description: Opt-in: starts a background monitor watching docker-compose services if a compose file is detected at session start. Emits one JSON line per service-state change to stdout. Honors SIGTERM cleanly. Exits silently when no compose file or docker CLI is present.

env_watch_interval.title: Docker compose health monitor poll interval (seconds)
env_watch_interval.description: How often the env-watch monitor polls `docker compose ps` for state changes. Minimum 5s. Only used when env_watch_enabled is true.
